company: Underdog.io -Apply to top tech jobs in 60 seconds. A place where companies apply to you
strengths: Production ELT pipelines with Airflow and dbt
weaknesses: No mention of vector stores or feature stores
improvement_bullets: Developed production-grade ELT pipelines with integrated data observability, using dbt tests and Great Expectations to monitor data quality and lineage in real-time.
Built and maintained foundational data structures for AI readiness, including prototyping vector store storage strategies and exploring embedding generation pipelines using Python and BigQuery.
Engineered and automated batch data workflows using Apache Airflow for robust orchestration, while actively architecting future-state streaming data integration capabilities.
Designed scalable data modeling architectures that prioritize downstream consumption, including the creation of feature store schemas to support efficient retrieval for AI-driven analytics.
Managed data reliability through proactive observability strategies, utilizing automated alerting and CI/CD workflows to ensure consistent data trust across the analytical ecosystem.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Data Engineer opportunity with the company. I am interested in this opportunity because of the platform's unique mission to modernize the fragmented franchise industry through agentic AI. What interests me about working for your team is your commitment to turning raw industry data into an AI-driven competitive moat, which inspires me because of my own background in building high-impact data infrastructure. I believe my expertise in production-grade ELT pipelines and my strong data modeling instincts would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached complex data problems by focusing on end-to-end ownership. In fact, while building the FRED Economic Batch Pipeline, I designed a dbt star schema from scratch, automating data quality checks with Great Expectations and deploying the entire system via GitHub Actions. This work reduced analyst query times significantly and established a clean, reliable dataset that powered executive-level Power BI reporting. Ultimately, I know that the Data Engineer role at your company would allow me to bring my experience in scalable data architecture to your core platform initiatives. Additionally, my role as a Full-Stack Software Developer enabled me to develop my technical versatility. I worked closely with stakeholders to translate raw user feedback and disparate REST API data into structured, clean datasets, which directly increased feature adoption by 15%. I am excited by the opportunity to use my background in AI-ready data engineering to build the retrieval layers and data pipelines that power your franchise AI agents. I know that my technical foundation and ownership mindset align with what it takes to succeed at the Data Engineer role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
